APP_ENV.description: Application environment. Use production on DeployRocks.

SECRET_KEY.description: JWT access token signing secret. Must be at least 32 characters.

JWT_REFRESH_SECRET_KEY.description: JWT refresh token signing secret. Must be different from SECRET_KEY.

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL async SQLAlchemy URL. Uses the docker-compose postgres service name.

DATABASE_NULL_POOL.description: Use NullPool for worker-style processes only. API should keep pooling enabled.

REDIS_URL.description: Redis URL. Uses the docker-compose redis service name.

CELERY_BROKER_URL.description: Celery broker URL backed by Redis.

CELERY_RESULT_BACKEND.description: Celery result backend URL backed by Redis.

CORS_ORIGINS.description: Comma-separated frontend origins. Replace with the DeployRocks frontend URL after first deploy.

AUTH_RATE_LIMIT_PER_MINUTE.description: Auth endpoint rate limit per minute.

DECAY_START_DAYS.description: Number of idle days before stock enters liquidation.

DECAY_DISCOUNT_PCT.description: Discount percentage applied by each decay cycle.

EMAIL_API_KEY.description: Assignment-compatible email API key. Gmail OAuth2 flow does not use this value.

SENDGRID_API_KEY.description: Assignment-compatible SendGrid key. Gmail OAuth2 flow does not use this value.

EMAIL_ENABLED.description: Set to true after adding real Gmail OAuth2 credentials in DeployRocks.

GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID.description: Real Google OAuth client ID. Set in DeployRocks dashboard, not in GitHub.

GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Real Google OAuth client secret. Set in DeployRocks dashboard, not in GitHub.

GOOGLE_OAUTH_REFRESH_TOKEN.description: Real Google OAuth refresh token. Set in DeployRocks dashboard, not in GitHub.

GMAIL_SENDER_EMAIL.description: Verified Gmail sender address. Set to your real sender in DeployRocks.

FRONTEND_BASE_URL.description: Public frontend URL. Replace with DeployRocks frontend URL after first deploy.

API_BASE_URL.description: Public backend API URL. Replace with DeployRocks backend URL after first deploy.

EMAIL_VERIFICATION_TOKEN_EXPIRE_HOURS.description: Email verification token expiry in hours.

PASSWORD_RESET_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES.description: Password reset token expiry in minutes.
